title: oxalis daitunensis
intro: Oxalis daitunensis, also known as the Daitunenoxalis, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family, Oxalidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Oxalis daitunensis has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction, where the roots and leaves are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
